title: polystichum × boottii
intro: Polystichum × boottii, also known as the Boott's fern, is a rare, sterile hybrid species of fern, resulting from the cross between Polystichum lonchitis and Polystichum braunii. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it is traditionally used in herbal remedies to treat various health issues. The Boott's fern is believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing inflammation, and acting as an anti-cancer agent. Herbal preparations of Polystichum × boottii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
